videoSnippet.title: All Hans Were Shaken... Except One! || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Theodorou, Nikolas (2634) - Niemann, Hans Moke (2742)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [01] 2026.06.07
D45 Queen's Gambit Declined semi-Slav, Stoltz variation

1.d4 d5 2.c4 c6 3.Nf3 Nf6 4.Nc3 e6 5.e3 Nbd7 6.Qc2 Bd6 7.g4 h6 8.Rg1 e5 9.Be2 Qe7 10.cxd5 Nxd5 11.Bd2 Nb4 12.Qb1 exd4 13.Nxd4 Nf6 14.a3 Nbd5 15.Nxd5 Nxd5 16.h3 Bd7 17.Nf5 Bxf5 18.Qxf5 g6 19.Qc2 O-O-O 20.O-O-O Kb8 21.Bc4 Bc7 22.Kb1 Rhe8 23.Bc1 Qf6 24.Rd3 Nb6 25.Rxd8+ Rxd8 26.Bf1 Qd6 27.Rh1 Qd5 28.e4 Qe5 29.Bxh6 g5 30.h4 gxh4 31.Rxh4 Qf6 32.Rh5 Bf4 33.e5 Qg6 34.Bxf4 Rd1+ 35.Bc1 Rxf1 36.Rh8+ Kc7 37.Qxg6 fxg6 38.Rh7+ Kc8 39.f4 Nd5 40.e6 Kd8 41.Rf7 Ne3 42.f5 gxf5 43.g5 Rg1 44.g6
